completed_slice: Committed and tested a CLI that verifies the canonical Vercel identity endpoint against an immutable commit and emits a machine-readable evidence packet.
verification: 5 deterministic assertions passed in an isolated Node runtime.
remaining: Run SITE_URL=https://mirror-cartographer-ui.vercel.app EXPECTED_COMMIT=<deployed-sha> node scripts/verify-vercel-deployment.mjs after a successful deployment.
Capture iPhone Safari audible outcome paired with window.__MC_AUDIO_PULSE__ and window.__MC_AUDIO_EVIDENCE__.
Bind the phone-side outcome to the verified deployment packet.
handoff: Deployment Verifier should execute the CLI against the next successful Vercel deployment; Mobile Safari Investigator and Audio Engineer should then perform the paired phone retest.
